message:
fix(export): add skill stripping to markdown/text/json export too

The previous commit only added skill stripping to export-html. The
plain `export` command (markdown, text, json, html formats) had the
exact same vulnerability — skill content was passed directly to
formatters with no filtering.

Added --include-skills flag to `cass export` (same as export-html)
and added messages.retain() filtering before the format step using
the same 5 detection patterns.

Both export paths now strip skill content by default.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
